creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
Whatever changed in Python 2.7.16 fixed the problem with libressl 2.8.3 in my Poudriere builds. Python 3.6.8 still fails to build, though. Applying Kai's CCache hack fixes the Python 3.6.8 build as well.

With CCache enabled, though, the build continues to fail. Log attached.
